overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking through a dystopian futuristic city. The scene features towering skyscrapers with large digital billboards, elevated train tracks, urban decay with trash piles, and steam rising from street vents under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with construction site and large billboard structure

events.description: NPC pedestrian passes very close to the camera, temporarily filling the frame

agents.ego_description: walking forward on the sidewalk approaching an NPC pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera and passing by on the left side

entered.detail: Massive billboard structure with orange support beams displaying 'TOUGH MORNING?' text
Construction site with metal scaffolding and blue tarps covering materials
Elevated concrete highway structure spanning across the street in the distance
Wooden utility pole with multiple power lines running along the left side

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk with construction scaffolding on the left and a massive orange billboard structure ahead. An NPC pedestrian approaches from the distance and passes close by the camera around the 10-second mark, moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with elevated train tracks and futuristic towers

events.description: passing the orange billboard structure, revealing the peep show billboard ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the orange billboard, heading toward the distant peep show sign

entered.detail: Large pink digital billboard displaying 'PEEP SHOW' with a stylized figure
Elevated metal train track structure with support beams running parallel to the street
Futuristic cylindrical skyscraper with large white '07' marking on the facade
Futuristic skyscraper with '08' marking visible behind tower 07

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the main commercial street after passing the orange billboard, with the large pink 'PEEP SHOW' billboard becoming visible in the distance. Elevated train tracks run parallel on the right side while futuristic skyscrapers tower above, and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching peep show building with atmospheric steam vents

events.description: steam becomes visible rising from street-level vents, creating atmospheric effects
camera turns left to explore a side street area with decayed buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the peep show building then turning left into a side street with abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: White steam or smoke rising from ground vents at street level near the peep show building
Piles of blue and black garbage bags stacked on the sidewalk and street corner

segments.scene_description: Approaching the peep show building with steam rising from street-level vents, creating atmospheric effects. The camera continues forward before making a left turn around 42 seconds to explore a side street area with decaying buildings and parked cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: decayed residential side street with abandoned vehicles and trash

events.description: entering the side alley with decayed apartment buildings and large trash piles

agents.ego_description: exploring the side street, looking at decayed apartment buildings, trash piles, and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: Decaying multi-story apartment buildings with exposed balconies, air conditioning units, and weathered facades
White sedan parked in the overgrown lot between buildings
Large vertical billboard displaying 'REAL WATER' text with a woman's face

segments.scene_description: Exploring a narrow side street filled with urban decay, featuring abandoned apartment buildings, piles of trash bags, and parked vehicles. The area feels neglected with overgrown vegetation and scattered debris, providing a contrast to the main commercial thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street approaching peep show building with pedestrians ahead

events.description: returning to main street from the side alley, rejoining the main thoroughfare

agents.ego_description: walking back onto the main street toward the peep show building, approaching pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: person in pink shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Large pink peep show billboard now directly ahead at the end of the street
Yellow and white vans parked along the right side of the street
Elevated train tracks visible again on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main street and walking toward the peep show building, passing parked vans along the right side. A pedestrian in a pink shirt approaches from the distance, walking toward the camera as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunlit urban sidewalk that transitions from a construction zone into a sprawling commercial district. It begins by moving past industrial scaffolding on the left toward a massive orange billboard structure, while a lone pedestrian approaches and passes closely in the opposite direction. As the camera moves beyond the orange structure, the view opens up to reveal a wide main street flanked by towering futuristic skyscrapers. The scene then expands to show elevated train tracks running parallel on the right and sparse vehicle traffic on the road, before the distant glow of a large pink PEEP SHOW billboard comes into focus.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that drifts from a bustling commercial area into a neglected urban alleyway before returning to the main street. It begins by approaching a peep show building as steam rises from street-level vents, creating a hazy atmosphere before the camera turns left into a narrow side street. As the view shifts, the environment transforms into a scene of urban decay characterized by abandoned apartment buildings, piles of trash bags, and overgrown vegetation. The camera then pivots back toward the main thoroughfare, passing a line of parked vans along the right side. Finally, the scene opens back up to the primary street as a pedestrian in a pink shirt approaches from the distance.
